MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BLOOMINGDALE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: JOHN HOUSTON SCOTT, ESQUIRE (SCOTT LAW FIRM, 415.561.9601) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. PAULA KUTANSKY-BROWN, ESQUIRE (GORDON & REES, 415.875.4238) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE OF A DISCRIMINATORY MOTIVE IS PROBLEMATIC. ASSUMING PLAINTIFF HAS MET HER BURDEN, DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE OF A LEGITIMATE REASON FOR NOT HIRING PLAINTIFF, HER COMBATIVE CONDUCT AS DESCRIBED BY GASSENSMITH, SVENSEN AND MASON. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE THAT SHE WAS NOT HIRED FOR REASONS OF NATIONAL ORIGIN IS BASED ON A SINGLE REMARK. AS A MATTER OF LAW, THAT REMARK FALLS WITH THE STRAY REMARK DOCTRINE DESCRIBED IN MARQUES V BANK OF AMERICA (N.D. CAL. 1999) 59 F. SUPP 2D 1005, 1019-1020. DEFENDANT'S PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION REFLECTS THE COURT'S REASONS FOR GRANTING THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
